task:
Complete the following three-part Thunderbird workflow:

1. Set the default identity's display name to `Alicia Brenner` (pref `mail.identity.id1.fullName` = `Alicia Brenner`).
2. Add a new Address Book contact with:
   - Display name: Tomasz Kowalski
   - Primary email: tomasz@globaldynamics.example
   - Company / Organization: Global Dynamics EU
   - Job title: Regional Sales Lead
3. Create a draft (do NOT send) with:
   - To: tomasz@globaldynamics.example
   - Subject: Welcome to the EU Region - Tomasz
   - Body: Hi Tomasz, welcome to Global Dynamics EU. Your Warsaw office onboarding is scheduled for next Monday at 9 AM. The HR team will send badges and laptop credentials before then. Looking forward to working with you.

verification.command: check-message-to Drafts 'Welcome to the EU Region' tomasz@globaldynamics.example
check-draft-content 'Welcome to the EU Region' 'Warsaw office onboarding'
